expectations.text: Identifies headless import as the root cause (not just one of many)
expectations.evidence: Section titled 'Most Likely Cause: Missing Import Step' — correctly identifies it as primary cause, not just a bullet

expectations.text: Provides exact fix command with --path flag: godot --headless --path <project> --import
expectations.evidence: Primary fix shows 'godot --headless --import' without --path flag. Steam example also omits --path. Only later mentions '--path .' in the workflow section

expectations.text: Explains WHY it happens (Godot resource system / .import sidecar files)
expectations.evidence: 'Godot must import it before it can be used as a resource... generate the corresponding .import sidecar files and the binary resources in the .godot/imported/ directory'

expectations.text: Mentions that this applies to ALL new assets, not just first time
expectations.evidence: 'Whenever you add new asset files to a Godot project while working with the MCP, follow this sequence'
